title: More Repairables
body:
You can now repair bows, crossbows, and tridents in the anvil.

![Bow in anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3cec0418e0ac05b014765712d19c93d866132fe.png)

![Crossbow in anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5f954ed84c705e03486ccbfbcd767d066a4d633.png)

![Trident in anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bfd332359c4e1d2bd778ef797ba0c26697c5878.png)
